texto: Captured by the ideological animus, both socialist and liberal-democratic art abandoned the criterion of beauty - considered anachronistic and of dubious political value - and replaced it with the criterion of correctness.
explicacao: Citação de Ryszard Legutko sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Captured by the ideological animus, both socialist and liberal-democratic art abandoned the crite…” articula reflexao, art, beauty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como beauty e liberal-democracy.

frase_original: Captured by the ideological animus, both socialist and liberal-democratic art abandoned the criterion of beauty - considered anachronistic and of dubious political value - and replaced it with the criterion of correctness.

texto: But it does not require much effort to see that the dialogue in liberal democracy is of a peculiar kind because its aim is to maintain the domination of the mainstream and not to undermine it. A deliberation is believed to make sense only if the mainstream orthodoxy is sure to win politically. Today's 'dialogue' politics are a pure form of the right-is-might politics, cleverly concealed by the ostentatiously vacuous rhetoric of all-inclusiveness.
explicacao: Citação de Ryszard Legutko sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “But it does not require much effort to see that the dialogue in liberal democracy is of a peculia…” articula tempo, liberal-dialogue, politics em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como politics.
